arts.ttl: Serie A | Empoli v Torino: Match Preview
arts.sum: As Empoli prepare to host Torino at the Stadio Carlo Castellani on Friday evening, both teams find themselves in need of a morale-boosting victory. The post Serie A | Empoli v Torino: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Vanoli: “Torino need a win for confidence; Linetty, Njie, and Vlasic are back”
arts.sum: Torino's head coach Paolo Vanoli is gearing up for a crucial match against Empoli as the team seeks to end a lengthy winless streak that dates back to October 25. The post Vanoli: “Torino need a win for confidence; Linetty, Njie, and Vlasic are back” appeared first on FootItalia.com.
